name: ephex-server
description: Secure serverless image sharing on Cloudflare Workers

scripts.db:init: XDG_CONFIG_HOME=$PWD/.tmp-config XDG_CACHE_HOME=$PWD/.tmp-cache wrangler d1 execute ephex-db --local --file=schema.sql
scripts.db:remote: XDG_CONFIG_HOME=$PWD/.tmp-config XDG_CACHE_HOME=$PWD/.tmp-cache wrangler d1 execute ephex-db --remote --file=schema.sql
